_comment: Per-file line-count budgets enforced by scripts/check-file-sizes.ts. New `.ts`/`.tsx` files default to `threshold` lines. Files listed in `budgets` are grandfathered at their commit-time line count (rounded up to the next 50 plus 50 headroom, per the L5-toolkit baselining procedure) and may not grow past their entry — the ratchet only goes DOWN. Loosening (raising `threshold` or a budget entry) requires an explicit commit by a human; the script never auto-edits this file. Baselined 2026-06-11 (pl-beec). Re-baselined 2026-06-29 for src/runtime/pi.ts, src/runtime/pi.test.ts, src/runner/dispatcher.test.ts: the frontmatter.pi option-bag feature (PR #44) landed on main in parallel with the standard adoption and grew these files past the original freeze.
